signals.trend: Tungsten chokepoint breaks West: Sangdong begins producing
signals.why: Sangdong's transition to saleable tungsten concentrate makes Almonty the only integrated non-China tungsten supplier ramping ahead of the DoD's Jan 1, 2027 ban on Chinese/Russian tungsten.
signals.evidence: Began feeding ~139,700 tonnes of stockpiled ore through the newly commissioned Sangdong plant — ~2.6 months of Phase I feed — as China's tungsten export curbs lifted APT prices ~23%.

sources.name: Business Wire
sources.title: Almonty Commences Processing Operations at Sangdong Mine

sources.name: TipRanks/TheFly
sources.title: Almonty commences processing operations at Sangdong Mine

sources.name: ad-hoc-news
sources.title: Sangdong Mill Begins Processing as China Ban Lifts APT Prices 23%

signals.why: A profitable Italian serial acquirer of orphaned consumer apps (AOL, Vimeo, Evernote, Eventbrite) priced at $29 and popped ~40%, closing a $1.68B offering — a new public vehicle for consumer-internet cash flows.
signals.evidence: Rallied 40% from its $29 IPO price to close at $40.50; Q1 2026 revenue rose 132% to $601.3M with a swing to profit.

sources.name: Bloomberg
sources.title: Bending Spoons Shares Jump 40% After $1.68 Billion IPO Debut

sources.name: TechCrunch
sources.title: Bending Spoons defies SaaS slump, surges 40% on first day

signals.why: Teal's advance to Gauntlet II — 49 companies cut to 19 — keeps Red Cat in the funnel for large-scale Army sUAS procurement, the concrete mechanism behind the drone-stock supercycle.
signals.evidence: Teal is among 19 companies invited to participate in Gauntlet II at Fort Carson, Colorado, in August 2026, after ~79 unique drones were tested at the Camp Grayling Phase 2 Qualifier.

sources.name: GlobeNewswire
sources.title: Red Cat's Teal Drones Advances to Gauntlet II of Drone Dominance Program

sources.name: Streetwise Reports
sources.title: Teal Drones Advances in Army Program Amid Sector Boom

signals.why: Lime's debut ($174M raised, +8% open) creates the only listed global e-scooter/e-bike operator — a clean comp for shared-mobility economics and a live test of its profitability claims.
signals.evidence: Priced at $25, began trading July 1 under 'LIME'; revenue grew from $522.0M (2023) to $886.7M (2025).

sources.name: Business Wire
sources.title: Lime Announces Pricing of Initial Public Offering

sources.name: MLQ News
sources.title: Lime Raises $174 Million in Nasdaq IPO

watchlist.trend: Franchise IPO window: Jersey Mike's files S-1
watchlist.why: A sandwich chain S-1 pitched partly on AI-driven operations, ~50% multi-year same-store-sales growth and eyebrow-raising related-party pay — a breadth marker for how wide the IPO window has opened.
watchlist.evidence: Filed for a US IPO on July 2; Forbes flagged '$50 million in pay for a stepson, a $41 million aircraft and a family on payroll' in the filing.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's files for US IPO
